message:
test(async-core,bootstrap,cli,conformance,graphql,host,mesh,raptorq,registry,sdk,streaming,telemetry,testkit): comprehensive unit test additions across 33 modules

Systematic test coverage push adding ~9,200 lines of new unit tests
across the entire flywheel_connectors workspace. All changes are purely
additive — new #[test] functions appended to existing test modules. No
production logic is modified.

Highlights by crate:

fcp-async-core: AsyncError traits, Deadline, ContextScope, ExecutionContext
  lifecycle, CancellationToken/Listener, TaskGroup instrumentation,
  BoundedSender/Receiver, shutdown module, runtime builder, channels

fcp-sdk (runtime/migration/streaming): SupervisorConfig builder/validation,
  backoff computation, heartbeat timeouts, PollingCursor, ConnectorSupervisor
  stats/state transitions, ConnectorRuntimeConfig builder, HttpRetryConfig,
  classify_http_status, RetryLoop/AttemptOutcome, streaming SDK

fcp-registry: RegistryError source chains, ConnectorManifest parsing,
  signing/verification flows, canonical serialization, lockfile validation

fcp-host/discovery: ToolDescriptor conversions, rate limit pool resolution,
  AI hints parsing, approval mode mapping, SafetyTier levels

fcp-telemetry/usage: UsageTelemetryConfig, CapabilityRecommendation,
  by_suggestion filtering, risk summaries, sampling, aggregate tracking

fcp-conformance: ComplianceFinding serde, CheckStatus traits, static/dynamic
  compliance, interop tests (capability, cross_zone, fcpc, fcps, session)

fcp-graphql/pagination: PageLimit, CursorPage/OffsetPage, paginate functions

fcp-raptorq: RFC 6330 rand()/deg() boundary tests, next_prime_ge,
  tuple_with_prime_p1, repair_indices, envelope serde/framing, error
  variants, decoder/encoder edge cases, OTI parameters

fcp-streaming: StreamError trait chains, reconnect delay/jitter/lifecycle,
  SSE parsing, WebSocket message types, stream lifecycle

fcp-cli: ConnectorHealth labels, ConnectorSummary, ExplainReport,
  DecisionOutcome, EvidenceType, reason_code_description for all FCP codes,
  extract_manifest_metadata, compute_sha256

fcp-bootstrap: classify_drift boundaries, compute_drift symmetry, Display
fcp-testkit: LogScan allowlist, multi-line scanning, token detection,
  TracingCapture/CapturedEvent/LogCapture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
